name: team espn line win rates with matchup_opponent_type param
description: Test case for team espn line win rates with matchup_opponent_type param
expected_query: with "current_week_opponents" as (select "h" as "nfl_team", "v" as "opponent" from "public"."nfl_games" where "year" = 2026 and "week" = 0 and "seas_type" = 'PRE' union select "v" as "nfl_team", "h" as "opponent" from "public"."nfl_games" where "year" = 2026 and "week" = 0 and "seas_type" = 'PRE'), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" = 'REG' and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2024) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year") select "player"."pid", "t2ef31fd05a4f03366c134047f2115de0"."run_block_win_rate" AS "espn_team_run_block_win_rate_0", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "current_week_opponents" on "player"."current_nfl_team" = "current_week_opponents"."nfl_team" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2024 left join "espn_team_win_rates_index" as "t2ef31fd05a4f03366c134047f2115de0" on "t2ef31fd05a4f03366c134047f2115de0"."team" = "current_week_opponents"."opponent" and "t2ef31fd05a4f03366c134047f2115de0"."year" = 2024 where player.pos IN ('TEAM') group by "t2ef31fd05a4f03366c134047f2115de0"."run_block_win_rate", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
